# prompt-firewall

> Stop prompt injection attacks before they reach your LLM. A sub-millisecond reverse proxy that sits between your app and any LLM API.

## Docs

- [README](README.md): Overview, quick start, API reference, configuration, performance benchmarks
- [main.go](main.go): HTTP server with reverse proxy, CLI flags, `/v1/chat/completions`, `/v1/scan`, `/health`, `/stats` endpoints
- [pcfi.go](pcfi.go): Core Firewall engine with provenance tracking and threat pattern detection (role-switch, lexical injection, privilege escalation, delimiter escape)
- [pcfi_test.go](pcfi_test.go): 22 tests covering all detection categories, HTTP handlers, health/stats endpoints, and benchmarks

## Quick Start

```bash
go install github.com/timholm/prompt-firewall@latest
prompt-firewall --upstream https://api.openai.com --listen :8080
```

## API

- POST /v1/scan - scan messages for injection threats
- POST /v1/chat/completions - scan + proxy to upstream LLM
- GET /health - health check with version and uptime
- GET /stats - request counters (total, allowed, blocked)
